info.title: BigCommerce API V3
info.description: Collection of requests for interacting with BigCommerce's V3 API

get.summary: Retrieve images for a single product
get.description: GET request for retrieving images associated with a product

post.summary: Upload a new product image to a single product
post.description: Adds a new product image from a publicly accessible URL. May fail if the hosting website is forcing HTTPS connections with TLS 1.0 (as this has been deprecated).

get.summary: Retrieve a single product with expanded sub-resources
get.description: Request a single product with expanded variant information

put.summary: Update a product in the catalog
put.description: Updates a single product's information in the catalog

delete.summary: Delete a single product by ID
delete.description: Deleting a single product from the catalog by product ID

get.summary: Retrieve a video on a product

put.summary: Updates an video on a product

delete.summary: Delete a video on a product

get.description: Returns a `Variant` object list from the BigCommerce Catalog.

get.summary: Retrieve all videos for a single product

post.summary: Add a video to a product using a video ID from Youtube
post.description: Creates an video on a product using a video ID from Youtube

put.description: Update a `Category` in the BigCommerce Catalog

post.summary: Upload an image for a brand

delete.description: Delete a `Brand` image the BigCommerce Catalog

get.summary: Retrieve all products with expanded sub-resources
get.description: Shows full product data with a single GET request

post.summary: Create a new product with variants
post.description: Sample request for creating a new product with variants through V3 Catalog API

delete.description: Deletes products that aren't marked as visible using a filter parameter

get.description: Returns a lightweight inventory summary from the BigCommerce Catalog.

get.summary: Retrieve an array of product options

post.summary: Create an image for a category

get.summary: Retrieve an array of product modifiers
Retrieve a single product image's data
get.description: GET request for a specific product image by ID

put.description: This is used to update the information for an existing product image

delete.description: Delete a product image and it's description
Delete one or more `Brand` objects from the BigCommerce Catalog

delete.summary: Delete a group of subscribers by parameter

get.description: Returns a paginated categories collection from the BigCommerce Catalog

get.summary: Return a single subscriber by ID

delete.summary: Delete a single subscriber by ID

get.description: Gets `Option` object by product id and option id.

post.summary: Add an image to a modifier value
post.description: Add an image to a modifier value that will show on the storefront when it’s selected

delete.summary: Delete the image associated with a modifier
delete.description: Delete the image applied to show when the modifier value is selected

get.description: Returns a `Variant` object list from the BigCommerce Catalog.
